memberdef.name: EFUSE_INTR_SOURCE
memberdef.initializer: 36 /* interrupt of efuse, level, not likely to use*/

memberdef.name: RTC_CORE_INTR_SOURCE
memberdef.initializer: 39 /* interrupt of rtc core and watchdog, level*/

memberdef.name: TG0_WDT_LEVEL_INTR_SOURCE
memberdef.initializer: 52 /* interrupt of TIMER_GROUP0, WATCH DOG, EDGE*/

memberdef.name: CACHE_IA_INTR_SOURCE
memberdef.initializer: 56 /* interrupt of Cache Invalid Access, LEVEL*/

memberdef.name: DCACHE_PRELOAD0_INTR_SOURCE
memberdef.initializer: 61 /* interrupt of DCache preload operation, LEVEL*/

memberdef.name: ICACHE_PRELOAD0_INTR_SOURCE
memberdef.initializer: 62 /* interrupt of ICache perload operation, LEVEL*/

memberdef.name: DCACHE_SYNC0_INTR_SOURCE
memberdef.initializer: 63 /* interrupt of data cache sync done, LEVEL*/

memberdef.name: ICACHE_SYNC0_INTR_SOURCE
memberdef.initializer: 64 /* interrupt of instr. cache sync done, LEVEL*/

memberdef.name: DMA_IN_CH0_INTR_SOURCE
memberdef.initializer: 66 /* interrupt of general DMA RX channel 0, LEVEL*/

memberdef.name: DMA_IN_CH1_INTR_SOURCE
memberdef.initializer: 67 /* interrupt of general DMA RX channel 1, LEVEL*/

memberdef.name: DMA_IN_CH2_INTR_SOURCE
memberdef.initializer: 68 /* interrupt of general DMA RX channel 2, LEVEL*/

memberdef.name: DMA_IN_CH3_INTR_SOURCE
memberdef.initializer: 69 /* interrupt of general DMA RX channel 3, LEVEL*/

memberdef.name: DMA_IN_CH4_INTR_SOURCE
memberdef.initializer: 70 /* interrupt of general DMA RX channel 4, LEVEL*/

memberdef.name: DMA_OUT_CH0_INTR_SOURCE
memberdef.initializer: 71 /* interrupt of general DMA TX channel 0, LEVEL*/

memberdef.name: DMA_OUT_CH1_INTR_SOURCE
memberdef.initializer: 72 /* interrupt of general DMA TX channel 1, LEVEL*/

memberdef.name: DMA_OUT_CH2_INTR_SOURCE
memberdef.initializer: 73 /* interrupt of general DMA TX channel 2, LEVEL*/

memberdef.name: DMA_OUT_CH3_INTR_SOURCE
memberdef.initializer: 74 /* interrupt of general DMA TX channel 3, LEVEL*/

memberdef.name: DMA_OUT_CH4_INTR_SOURCE
memberdef.initializer: 75 /* interrupt of general DMA TX channel 4, LEVEL*/

memberdef.name: FROM_CPU_INTR0_SOURCE
memberdef.initializer: 79 /* interrupt0 generated from a CPU, level*/

memberdef.name: FROM_CPU_INTR1_SOURCE
memberdef.initializer: 80 /* interrupt1 generated from a CPU, level*/

memberdef.name: FROM_CPU_INTR2_SOURCE
memberdef.initializer: 81 /* interrupt2 generated from a CPU, level*/

memberdef.name: FROM_CPU_INTR3_SOURCE
memberdef.initializer: 82 /* interrupt3 generated from a CPU, level*/

memberdef.name: ASSIST_DEBUG_INTR_SOURCE
memberdef.initializer: 83 /* interrupt of Assist debug module, LEVEL*/

memberdef.name: ESP_INTR_FLAG_SHARED
memberdef.initializer: (1<<8) /* Interrupt can be shared between ISRs */
